name: Clam and Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain juice from clams and save the liquid.
2. Chop the clams.
3. Melt butter.
4. Blend in flour and seasonings.
5. Mix clam juice with milk to make 1 1/2 cups.
6. Add to flour blend slowly while cooking over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture is thick and smooth.
7. Add clams.
8. Place half of potatoes in a greased casserole dish.
9. Sprinkle half the onions over the potatoes.
10. Cover with half the sauce.
11. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
12. Sprinkle with cheese and paprika.
13. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
